TimeEntry.Title: Veeam ONE Server upgraded 12.3.0.4670 to 13.0.0.5630 on the BWH-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by Lead, worked on BWH-HQ-VONE Veeam one upgradation. Earlier installation was cancelled due to error. So troubleshoot the error. Reboot the server and reinstalled the upgraded version. Now it is running on step2 out of step 4. We will monitor the progress.

TimeEntry.Title: Checked Servers for Pending Restart in ManageEngine
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to the ManageEngine console to verify if any servers or systems require a restart after the recent patching.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall Backup for BWH SOPHOS firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the bwh Sophos firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Monthly Switch Backup for 10.1.1.2 Switch
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Network switch to perform the Monthly backup for the 10.1.1.2 Switch. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config -Switch folder.

TimeEntry.Title: Missing patch update on the systems:- BWWS-Conf2, BWH-HQ-VONE, BWWS029-PC, BWWS030-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the manage engine portal and check approved patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed. connected to the machine through MY RMM and installed the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then reboot the machine and scan the machine for installed patches. After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully.

Machine is: - BWWS-Conf2, BWH-HQ-VONE, BWWS029-PC, BWWS030-PC

Patch installed:- 1419513OptiPlex 5090 (1.37.0)

1318200 RocketLake-S GT1 [UHD Graphics 750][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_4C8A] (32.0.101.6987)

352026 Sophos Connect (MSI) (2.5.0) (Manual Upload Required)

351584 Cisco Secure Client - AnyConnect VPN (5.1.11.388) (Manual Upload Required)

1419608 Optiplex 7080 (1.36.0)

 1318214 Comet Lake PCH CNVi WiFi[PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_06F0] (23.160.0.4)

352165 TreeSize Free (4.8.0.603)

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (v 25.7.7.9426) update:- BWWS027-PC, BWH-HQ-LT-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the devices (BWWS027-PC, BWH-HQ-LT-01) were running an outdated version of Screen Connect. I initiated the update for these devices from the portal, but after the update, I noticed some issues when verifying the version on the portal. connected to the machines through My Rmm and uninstall the screen connect software through Revo uninstaller. after that download and install the fresh MyRemote setup and install on it  and verify that agents have been updated successfully with the latest version(v 24.3.4.9026). Hence closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: ScreenConnect Updated to Version 25.5.3.9371 on BRANDYWINEMYLE
TimeEntry.Notes: ScreenConnect has been successfully updated to version 25.5.3.9371 on the following system:BRANDYWINEMYLE

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam ONE Server upgraded 12.3.0.4670 to 13.0.0.5630 on the BWH-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: Tha installation was completed, and it's showing the updated version on the portal, but the license was not getting updated, so I downloaded and installed the VONE license after that showing up and running.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.29.20108.0)updated on machine:- BWH-HQ-DT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-07, BWLAP-06, BWWS029-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (BWH-HQ-DT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-07, BWLAP-06, BWWS029-PC) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful. Subsequently, uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.29.20108.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.29.20108.0)updated on machines BWWS016-PC,BWWS017-PC,BWWS021-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines BWWS016-PC,BWWS017-PC,BWWS021-PC
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.29.20108.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patch updated on machine BWH-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
following patch failed to install: QNAP Qfinder Pro (7.13.0.1014). Connected to BWH-HQ-VBR-01 and manually downloaded and installed QNAP Qfinder Pro version 7.13.0.1014 to ensure it was successfully applied. Verified the installation and confirmed completion.
Then scanned the serverin the ManageEngine portal to clear the pending patch status. The patch has now been successfully cleared.

TimeEntry.Title: Update Cisco Umbrella Ver 5.1.12.146 on BWWS021-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.11.388) (Manual Upload Required). Connected to BWWS021-PC and manually downloaded and installed Cisco Umbrella Ver 5.1.12.146to ensure it was successfully applied. Verified the installation and confirmed completion.Then scanned the computer in the ManageEngine portal to clear the pending patch status.

TimeEntry.Title: Updated Cisco Secure Client to the latest version 5.1.12.146 on the following systems:BWLAP-06 BWWS016-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Updated Cisco Secure Client (AnyConnect VPN) to the latest version 5.1.12.146 on the following systems:

  • BWLAP-06

  • BWWS016-PC

Connected to both computers and manually installed the updated Cisco Secure Client version 5.1.12.146 to replace the previous version. Verified successful installation and confirmed connectivity.
Then performed a scan in the ManageEngine portal to ensure compliance and clear any pending patch status.
Both systems have been successfully updated and verified.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Adobe not responding
TimeEntry.Notes:
Sandy was facing an issue with Adobe where the application stopped responding whenever she tried to open PDF files. I logged into her machine and confirmed the issue with her. To verify the scope, I tested by opening multiple files and found that the problem occurred with all PDFs. I then ended all Adobe-related tasks from Task Manager and checked for any Adobe updates, but none were available.

Next, I restarted her system using the “Update and Restart” option, as a Windows Update was pending. The update process took around ten minutes to complete. After the restart, I tested again and found that Adobe was now opening files correctly. However, one specific file still wouldn’t open in Adobe—it appeared to be damaged—but it opened successfully in Chrome. I guided Sandy to open that particular file in Chrome instead and confirmed that all other files were working fine. I then logged off her computer and informed her to contact me if she experiences any further issues.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines- BWH-HQ-LT-09 and BWH-HQ-LT-13
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWH-HQ-LT-09 and BWH-HQ-LT-13 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines- BWH-HQ-CONF-01, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-DT-03, BWH-HQ-LT-10
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWH-HQ-CONF-01, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-DT-03, BWH-HQ-LT-10 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.29.20108.0)updated on machines BWH-HQ-WINEDGE,BWH-HQ-VBR-01,BWH-HQ-IIS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines [BWH-HQ-WINEDGE,BWH-HQ-VBR-01,BWH-HQ-IIS-01] running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.29.20108.0of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Slow Computer
TimeEntry.Notes:
Issue:

User reported that a specific PDF file was not opening correctly in Adobe Acrobat. The issue was identified as being caused by restrictions on the file itself, which was preventing it from interacting properly with Acrobat.

Troubleshooting Steps:

Confirmed that the issue was not with Adobe Acrobat but rather with the PDF file itself, which had certain restrictions.

Verified that a similar issue had been encountered by another user, Sandy, and confirmed the same solution worked for her.

Performed a memory cleanup on the system to optimize performance and resolve any background processes causing slowness.

Tested alternative file opening methods by advising the user to open the file using Google Chrome or any other PDF viewer.

Solution Provided:

Instructed the user to open the problematic PDF file using Google Chrome or another PDF viewer to bypass the restrictions in Adobe Acrobat.

Advised the user to restart the computer to apply the memory cleanup and optimize performance.

Status:

Resolved: User was able to view the PDF file successfully in Chrome. No further action required unless issues persist.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.7.7.9426 updated on machine RG01,RA01,FS01,DC04
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine RG01,RA01,FS01,DC04
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.7.7.9426. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

I initiated the update for these devices from the portal, but after the update, I noticed some issues when verifying the version on the portal. connected to the machines through My Rmm and uninstall the screen connect software through Revo uninstaller. after that download and install the fresh MyRemote setup and install on it  and verify that agents have been updated successfully with the latest version(v 24.3.4.9026). Hence closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Notes:
ScreenConnect has been successfully updated to version 25.5.3.9371 on BWWS022-PC. Previous machine entries were removed as per the request.

Post-update verification was completed:

  • All services are running correctly.

  • Remote connectivity has been successfully tested with no issues observed.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH-HQ-LT-05 : APD not succeeded as system found Low and critical disk space left
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machine's backend and increased the available space by 8GB using the standard cleaning method. The total available space is now 11GB.

TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (BWH-HQ-DT-03,BWH-HQ-DT-04,BWH-HQ-LT-01,BWH-HQ-LT-06)and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful. Subsequently, uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.29.20108.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: need help login to VNP - ASAP
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received an email from Daisy reporting that she was unable to log in to the VPN on her computer even though the VPN connection was established.

Findings:
Upon investigation, the issue was related to Sophos MFA — the authentication process was not accepting her credentials. The MFA configuration on her Sophos account required a reset and reconfiguration.

Action Taken:

  • Reset and reconfigured Daisy’s Sophos MFA account.

  • Verified that the login was successful after reconfiguration — VPN login working correctly.

  • Additionally, Daisy reported another issue where her Neustar Sales account was locked.

  • Connected to the APP server using the Admin account.

  • Accessed the User Management section and unlocked Daisy’s Sales account.

Result:

  • Daisy was able to successfully log in to VPN after MFA reset.

  • Neustar Sales account unlocked and access restored.

Status:
? Issue resolved and verified with the user.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: new help asap
TimeEntry.Notes: Received ticket form Rahul -As Daisy was not able to login to Newstart sales-confirmed her password is incorrect then logged in to NS SALES with admin and reset Daisy  password

TimeEntry.Title: Re: new help asap
TimeEntry.Notes: Received an email from Daisy regarding the New Star issue. Connected to the user’s system and began troubleshooting. Found that the issue was caused by a password error — attempted to log in, but the login was unsuccessful. The case has been handed over to the tech team for further resolution

TimeEntry.Title: BWLAP-06 : Low disk space found on this sytem via myrmm
TimeEntry.Notes: Disk space was optimized by applying several standard cleanup methods, and the available space has now increased from 13GB to 25 GB.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP Alert - Critical - BWH-HQ-LT-03.brandywinedev.localMemory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the assigned ticket. Logged into the OPS manager and observed machine BWH-HQ-LT-03 has memory threshold error. So
Connected to machine from manage engine and killed the unnecessary task from task manager. After completing these steps,
 all sensors resumed normal operation. As a result, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH-HQ-APP-01,BWH-CABRILLO-TV,BWWS019-PC,BWWS-CONF2 : Cisco umbrella updated with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: BWH-HQ-APP-01,BWH-CABRILLO-TV,BWWS019-PC,BWWS-CONF2 : Cisco umbrella updated with latest version 5.1.12.146.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for BWWS-Conf2,BW-ACCT02,RA01,RG01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the Manage Engine portal and found  BWWS-Conf2,BW-ACCT02,RA01,RG01 machine showing offline in Manage Engine Portal 
and were having grey out status. So connected to the machines. Checked and restart the Manage Engine services.
But nothing happened. So removed the agent  and installed the updated version (11.4.2516.26.W) in the machine.
 After that refresh the manage engine portal. Now the machines are showing online. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines:- BWWS-CONF2, BWWS030-PC, BWWS021-PC, BWLAP-18
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWWS-CONF2, BWWS030-PC, BWWS021-PC, BWLAP-18 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Internet is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Pon reported that internet was down. Confirmed that all systems were offline in our portals. Contacted COX and found that issue was non-payment. Updated Pon, who submitted the payment. Per COX they should be back up within 30 minutes.

TimeEntry.Title: Internet is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Pon reached out and said internet was still down. Cox asked that we check their firewall equipment. I went onsite and rebooted the Sophos to no avail. Connected COX line directly to my laptop for troubleshooting and but still no internet. On call with COX for over an hour troubleshooting different settings. COX escalated to a higher level tech.

TimeEntry.Title: Internet is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Internet was restored. COX needed to re-activate their circuit and missed a step during the restore. The upper level tech resolved the issue. Troubleshooting 2 computers in accounting that were not receiving IP addresses from DHCP. Set static to verify it worked, then turned DHCP back on and verified they can now connect. Assist Joseph Perri with monitor installation.

TimeEntry.Title: Liz missing excel data
TimeEntry.Notes: Call with Liz to try and help her locate missing excel data. Checked version history and temp saved files, but it looks like nothing was saved between Friday morning and Saturday. Her changes were made on Friday afternoon.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.29.20108.0 on BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-1 & BWWS-CONF2
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-1 & BWWS-CONF2  needed updates. I updated both to version 7.29.20108.0

TimeEntry.Title: RE: NEED HELP - FW: Status of Ticket 202-00-576776 has changed to Assigned for Brandywine Homes
TimeEntry.Notes:
I connected to Tracie’s computer and followed the steps provided to resolve the NSS printer report issue. The user was receiving an ActiveX error when printing NSS reports. To fix this, I installed the required Crystal Reports components using the following installers:

  • N:\salesp\splive\system32\setup.exe

  • N:\salesp\splive\system32\Crystal Reports 10 Runtime.msi

After installation, the NSS printing issue was resolved.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.29.20108.0)updated on machines BWH-HQ-LT-08,BWH-HQ-LT-10
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines [BWH-HQ-LT-08,BWH-HQ-LT-10] running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.29.20108.0of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.29.20108.0 on BWH-HQ-LT-19 & BWLAP-19
TimeEntry.Notes: I logged in to the CrowdStrike portal and found that  BWH-HQ-LT-19 & BWLAP-19 required the latest version update. Then, I proceeded to update it with version 7.29.20108.0

TimeEntry.Title: RE: please help login newstar asap
TimeEntry.Notes: Daisy was unable to log in as it showed an “invalid password” error. Attempted a password reset but it couldn’t be completed without accessing the admin portal. Before logging in as admin, checked Daisy’s last password request, which matched previous records. Coordinated with Sourabh, who had the most recent password saved from the last approved change. Tried that password, and it worked successfully. Guided Daisy to continue using this password moving forward and confirmed that she was able to log in without any further issues.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Re:[## 5434 ##] Fw: Please review for your 2025/2026 informXL Analyzer Release
TimeEntry.Notes: Completed the meeting invite request for Sunny, scheduling the session with Clair and Dan for 12/3 at 10 AM as requested. The meeting details were sent successfully. The prerequisites — providing admin access on the SQL server and setting up a licensed M365 account on the RA server for InformXL Analyzers — will be processed three days before the meeting to ensure everything is configured and ready in advance.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH-HQ-LT-03 : Low disk space found
TimeEntry.Notes: This system was found to have low disk space. By following standard cleanup methods, the disk space was improved from 8GB to 16GB.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Ticket #: 202-00-575028 Assigned -- NSE | SSL Certificate Update - Brandywine - Expiration November 21, 2025
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the settings with Aditya on all servers for SSL installation.

So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.31.20308.0 .0of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Server RA01 pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked  machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.
After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machine for installed patches in APD. After scan  the machine is now in healthy systems.

Machine : RA01

TimeEntry.Title: BWH Servers are pending reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes: Log in to the Manage Engine to check the servers BWH-HQ-APP-01, BWH-HQ-IIS-01, BWH-HQ-RDP-01, BWH-HQ-SQL-01, BWH-HQ-VBR-01, BWH-HQ-VONE, DC03, DC04, FS01 which have not been rebooted. So connected to the servers and rebooted them and verified all the services are running fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Server Restarted After APD to Deploy Patches (BWH-HQ-VONE)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Performed the APD on the server as part of the scheduled patch deployment:

  • BWH-HQ-VONE

Restarted the server after applying the patches. Post-restart, verified all automatic services and confirmed that all automatic services are running as expected.

After verification, initiated a full scan from the ManageEngine portal to update the patch status and clear the pending items from the console. The server is now reporting correctly in the portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall Backup for BWH SOPHOS firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the bwh Sophos firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket...

TimeEntry.Title: Server BWH-HQ-VONE pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked  machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.
After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machine for installed patches in APD. After scan  the machine is now in healthy systems.


Machine : BWH-HQ-VONE

TimeEntry.Title: Installed Failed and Missing Patches on BWH Servers
TimeEntry.Notes:
Installed Failed and Missing Patches on Servers


BWH-HQ-APP-01, BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-1, BWH-HQ-VBR-01, DC03, DC04



Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64) (14.50.35710.0)
2025-11 Cumulative Update for Microsoft server operating system version 21H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5068787) (CVE-2025-62215)
2025-10 Cumulative Update for Windows Server 2019 for x64-based Systems (KB5070883)

TimeEntry.Title: Identified Synchronization issues in ManageEngine :BW-ACCT02,BWH-HQ-VBR-01,BWH-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the ManageEngine portal and verified sync status for devices BW-ACCT02,BWH-HQ-VBR-01,BWH-HQ-VONE.Checked communication between endpoint agents and the ManageEngine server.Performed troubleshooting steps to restore connectivity.Re-initiated synchronization and confirmed successful communication.Current Status:Synchronization has been successfully restored. All devices are now reporting and syncing properly in ManageEngine.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.29.20108.0)updated on machines BWH-HQ-LT-09 and BWLAP-19
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines BWH-HQ-LT-09 and BWLAP-19 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.29.20108.0of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.31.20308.0)updated on machine:- BWH-CABRILLO-TV, BWH-HQ-LT-05, BWH-HQ-LT-19, BWWS030-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (BWH-CABRILLO-TV, BWH-HQ-LT-05, BWH-HQ-LT-19, BWWS030-PC)and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful. Subsequently, uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.31.20308.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Ticket #: 202-00-575028 Assigned -- NSE | SSL Certificate Update - Brandywine - Expiration November 21, 2025
TimeEntry.Notes: Purchased SSL and rekeyed and installed on all BWH Newstar server, tested with Support and it worked fine, sent email to Dave.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines- BWH-HQ-DT-01,BWH-HQ-DT-04 and BWH-HQ-LT-05
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines  BWH-HQ-DT-01,BWH-HQ-DT-04 and BWH-HQ-LT-05 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Help
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an email from Rosa regarding a password reset request. Connected to the AD server and reset the password as per the details mentioned in her email. Informed Rosa to check and confirm that she is able to log in. The issue has been resolved, and the ticket is now being closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines:- BWH-HQ-LT-06, BWH-HQ-LT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-19, BWLAP-19
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWH-HQ-LT-06, BWH-HQ-LT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-19, BWLAP-19 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines- BWWS017-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWWS017-PC not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Your veeam license has been expired on BWH-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: During the Veeam backup check, I noticed that the VSPC portal was showing a warning that the Veeam license had expired. To resolve this, I connected to the BWH-HQ-VBR-01 server and verified that the license was running in the grace period. I then logged into the Veeam Pulse portal, updated the license expiry date to the end of March, downloaded the required license file, and initiated the installation process. Once the installation was completed, I restarted the VSPC agent service on the server and verified that the updated license is now visible on the VSPC portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.31.20308.0)updated on machine:- BRANDYWINEMYLE, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-LT-03, BWH-HQ-LT-07
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (BRANDYWINEMYLE, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-LT-03, BWH-HQ-LT-07)and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system through MY Rmm and  uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.31.20308.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Cleared the access denied alerts for DC04 and DC03 from the Ops Manager portal.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to the portal and found that the servers listed below were showing alerts. I checked the firewall and network settings, deleted the threshold alarms, and rediscovered the servers in the portal. They are now showing updated status

TimeEntry.Title: ACH setup for Pon
TimeEntry.Notes: Check out current installation of software per documentation provided by Constellation support, however, the directory and file names are different from what is listed in their docs. Reached out to their support for guidance.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.31.20308.0 on BWH-HQ-DT-03 & BWH-HQ-IIS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated BWH-HQ-DT-03 & BWH-HQ-IIS-01 needed updates. I updated both to version 7.31.20308.0

TimeEntry.Title: help with printing
TimeEntry.Notes:
John from BWH reported and issue with the Printer...

so connect to the user system and checked he is not able to print as all the document was stuck in queue...

so clear the print queue and print  the test page...printer is working fine...

so tried to the print the excel sheet but got an error while printing the excel sheet....

so login to the OneDrive on web and print the same excel document and able to print from the web...

however again while printing from the Excel sheet got the same error...

Connect later in after hour and add the printer using IP address and try to print the document and its working fine...

so mailed to user to check the confirm back if its working fine....

As its taking time so asked user to connect later....user is busy so he agree to connect later in after hour....

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine BWLAP-15
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the  ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and check failed patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed 
the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then reboot the machine and  scan the machine for installed patches.
After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine is in healthy state.


Machine : BWLAP-15


Patch installed:
Patch ID   Patch Name
1421495 Precision 3480 (1.26.1)
1318484 Raptor Lake PCH CNVi WiFi[PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_51F1] (23.160.1.2)
1318273 Raptor Lake-P [Iris Xe Graphics][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_A7A0] (32.0.101.6987)
1318021 RTL8153 Gigabit Ethernet Adapter[USB\VID_0BDA&PID_8153] (1153.18.305.2025)

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machines BWWS-Conf2, BWWS019-PC, BWWS017-PC, BWWS016-PC, BWH-HQ-LT-17
TimeEntry.Notes:
During the routine patch review, it was observed that the BWWS-Conf2, BWWS019-PC, BWWS017-PC, BWWS016-PC, BWH-HQ-LT-17 system had failed to install below patch. Investigate the issue and verified that the failure was due to incomplete downloads during the previous update cycle. Manually re-initiated the patch installation process and confirmed that all pending updates were successfully installed. final scan was performed through the portal to confirm

TimeEntry.Title: Nancy from BWH called for printer issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Nancy called that he is having issue while printing...

So took the remote access for her computer and found that the printer is low on ink...

so she is not able to print on color...so guide her how to print black and white and showed her which cartidges to buy for the printer...

no more issue reported by the user....hence closing the ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall backup for the BWH Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the BWH Firewall, downloaded the backup file, and placed it in the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Nancy from BWH called for remote app issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Nancy from BWH called for remote app issue....

So took the remote access of the computer and found that she is not able to access the remote app due the the certificate error...

so checked the SSL certificate got expire....

so reissue the new certificate and Bind with the Apps...

Asked user to check the now....

she is able to access the Remote Apps now.....hence closing the ticket.......

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.31.20308.0)updated on machine:- BWH-HQ-DT-03, BWWS021-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (BWH-HQ-DT-03, BWWS021-PC)and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system through MY Rmm and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.31.20308.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Firmware Update for Firewall BWH from SFOS 21.0.1 MR-1-Build277 to SFOS 21.5.1 MR-1-Build261
TimeEntry.Notes: The firmware update for firewall BWH was successfully completed. The device was backed up prior to the upgrade to ensure configuration and settings were preserved. The firmware was upgraded from version SFOS 21.0.1 MR-1-Build277 to SFOS 21.5.1 MR-1-Build261 during the scheduled maintenance window. Post-upgrade, the firewall was thoroughly monitored, and all systems and services were verified to be functioning correctly with no issues detected. Relevant system documentation has been updated to reflect the new firmware version and any configuration changes made during the update process.

TimeEntry.Title: help with printing
TimeEntry.Notes: John had issue again with printer, Connected on computer and install and configure printer with correct driver ,Did test with John and confirmed printer issue has been fixed.

TimeEntry.Title: Emails
TimeEntry.Notes: Brett reported that he was not receiving emails from Singapore Air. I checked the anti spam policy and verified that the sender was not blocked, and I informed him of the same. I then reviewed the mail trace and found two emails from Singapore Air that had been quarantined. I released both messages for Brett and added the Singapore Air sender to the allow list to prevent future issues. This will ensure Brett receives all future Singapore Air emails without interruption.

TimeEntry.Title: Remove BWLAP-21 as system is showing offline more than 60 days
TimeEntry.Notes:
Remove BWLAP-21 as system is showing offline more than 60days..

So removed BWLAP-21 from following portal Crowdstrike, MyRmm and Cisco Umbrella portal...

TimeEntry.Title: ManageEngine Agent Syncing Issue with the Portal on These Machines: - BWH-CABRILLO-TV, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-LT-07, BWH-HQ-LT-08
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BWH-CABRILLO-TV, BWH-HQ-DT-02, BWH-HQ-LT-07, BWH-HQ-LT-08 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Starlink Emails
TimeEntry.Notes: I investigated Brett’s missing email by running a message trace, which showed the message was successfully delivered. I informed Brett and asked him to check other folders. He later confirmed the email had been found.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.31.20308)updated on machines BWWS-CONF2, DC03, DC04
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines BWWS-CONF2, DC03, DC04 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines from backend and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.31.20308 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine agent version (11.4.2516.26.W) Upgrade on BWH - servers
TimeEntry.Notes: Pushed the agent from portal but did update so loggedinot below server and upgrade the latest version of Manage Engine ( (11.4.2516.26.W) ) BWH-HQ-APP-01, BWH-HQ-IIS-01, BWH-HQ-VBR-01, BWH-HQ-VONE, DC03, DC04

TimeEntry.Title: ManageEngine Agent Communication Issue with Portal on the Following :RA01, RG01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the ManageEngine portal and found that the agents on  RA01, RG01 were not communicating with the console. Connected to each affected system and attempted to restart the ManageEngine service, but it failed to respond. Uninstalled the corrupted ManageEngine agent and installed the latest version. After reinstallation, all agents successfully reconnected and are now communicating properly with the portal. Issue resolved and ticket closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Pending reboot after automate patch deployeed
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into below server and rebooted manually one by one, verified all services up and running fine, rescanned patches from portal, no pending patches missing and failed
RA01,BWH-HQ-IIS-01,BWH-HQ-RDP-01,BWH-HQ-APP-01,BWH-HQ-SQL-01,BWH-HQ-VONE,FS01

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam Backup & Replication 13 Version updated on BWH-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
BWHHQ-VBR-01 - I downloaded the latest version 13 of Veeam Backup & Replication and uninstalled the old version. Before removing the previous installation, I took a full configuration backup to ensure we could restore all settings.

After that, I ran the new setup file. During the installation process, the server rebooted multiple times as required. Once the installation was completed, I uploaded the configuration backup file to restore all previous settings and jobs.

I then verified the entire setup, and everything is working correctly with the updated version.

TimeEntry.Title: Missing patch update on the systems:- BWH-HQ-LT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-05, BWH-HQ-CONF-01, BWWS030-PC, BWH-HQ-DT-04
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the manage engine portal and check approved patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed. connected to the machine through MY RMM and installed the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then reboot the machine and scan the machine for installed patches. After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully.

Machine is: - BWH-HQ-LT-01, BWH-HQ-LT-05, BWH-HQ-CONF-01, BWWS030-PC, BWH-HQ-DT-04

Patch installed:- 1318562  Raptor Lake-S GT1 [UHD Graphics 770][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_A780] (32.0.101.7040)

1318549 RocketLake-S GT1 [UHD Graphics 750][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_4C8A] (32.0.101.7040)

1317908 Realtek High Definition Audio[INTELAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0289] (6.0.9853.1)

1317907 Realtek High Definition Audio[INTELAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0236] (6.0.9853.1)

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade Veeam backup version to the latest version- VeeamBackup&Replication_13.0.1.180_20251114.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the VBR server and found there is error on backup job after version upgrade. Go to the error and start investigating the issue with repo. Troubleshoot the issue and apply many articles which fix the issues with file share access from QNAP and cloud repo. After that update the repositories again for both local QNAP and cloud backups. once everything was updated correctly then edit the backup job as well. Complete the backups successfully.
